title: 10 public spectacle private visitor

Meg is privately engaged, not unimpressed. AVOID — extra familiar, green character, generic purple imp, crowded seating, mecha in foreground, romance, split-screen layout.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage, contact sheet, or storyboard grid. Treat each attached image only according to its declared authority. Preserve Raul and Meg as the same teenagers, and preserve the established top-of-bleachers world, dusk light, clothing, and geography. Attached ingredient sheets are exact character or object design authorities; reproduce them faithfully rather than redesigning them from prose.
